docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,183.48 FILED BY FILIAN LEVON AS TO DEFENDANT TONEL CLAIRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO TONEL CLAIRE, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILIAN LEVON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TONEL CLAIRE DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDING FILED BY DEF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TONEL CLAIRE
CORRESP. REGARDING DEFENDANT FILED CHAPTER XII BANKRUPTCY COURT, CASE # 933 0808 BTC.
